title: MC-Reality Mod
description: this is a mod for Minecraft that seeks to transform the game experience into something closer to real life. It includes elements such as needs management (hunger, health, energy), an economy system, work, and the ability to interact with other player
body:
this is a mod for Minecraft that introduces real-life simulation mechanics, offering players a more immersive and complex experience. In this mod, players must manage various needs, such as hunger, health, and energy, similar to how they would in everyday life.

In addition, it includes an economic system where players can work, earn money and buy items, as well as a social interaction system that encourages collaboration and competition between players. With the ability to establish homes, create businesses, and participate in community activities, MC-Reality transforms the game into a life simulation, challenging players to adapt and thrive in a world that more closely reflects reality.
